name: forgeflow-mini
description: Brain-driven development plugin — subagent dispatch, 14 skills, 8 hooks, circuit breaker, confidence-scored learning

skills.name: brain-init
skills.description: Initialize Brain for any project (scan > generate > review > persist > hooks > index > state > env-check)

skills.name: brain-decision
skills.description: MANDATORY entry point — classifies complexity, loads context, selects model, dispatches to brain-task

skills.name: brain-task
skills.description: Full task orchestration — circuit breaker, state persistence, inline or subagent dispatch, verification, archival

skills.name: brain-map
skills.description: ContextMapper — load 3-tier weighted sinapses for task context

skills.name: brain-plan
skills.description: Planner — convert context packet to structured implementation plan

skills.name: brain-verify
skills.description: 6-phase verification — build, types, lint, tests, security, diff review

skills.name: brain-eval
skills.description: Define success criteria before implementation — capability and regression evals

skills.name: brain-aside
skills.description: Answer a quick question without losing current brain-task pipeline context

skills.name: brain-mckinsey
skills.description: Strategic intelligence — internal scoring + external research for high-stakes decisions

skills.name: brain-document
skills.description: Documenter — propose sinapse updates after task completion

skills.name: brain-lesson
skills.description: Learner — capture failures as lessons with confidence scoring (0.3 initial)

skills.name: brain-consolidate
skills.description: Consolidation cycle — batch process tasks, propose sinapse updates, escalate lessons to conventions

skills.name: brain-status
skills.description: Health dashboard — display Brain stats and regenerate 3D visualization

skills.name: brain-codex-review
skills.description: Codex code review agent — validates implementation, finds bugs, checks conventions
